message:
Fix ETag collisions and YAML escaping edge cases

ETag fix (prompts/route.ts):
- Replace weak 32-bit DJB2 hash with base64url encoding
- Guarantees no collisions between different filter combinations
- Previous hash could theoretically produce same ETag for different
  params, causing incorrect 304 Not Modified responses
- Also fixes no-op line: "hash = hash & hash" did nothing

YAML escaping fix (yaml.ts):
- Add YAML 1.1 boolean detection (yes/no/on/off/true/false)
- Add null value detection (null/~/Null/NULL)
- Add numeric literal detection (integers, floats, hex, octal)
- Add missing special start characters: - ? % \`
- Add comma (flow context separator)
- Handle empty string edge case (returns "")
- Add looksLikeNumber() helper for numeric pattern matching

These edge cases could cause YAML parsing to interpret string values
as booleans, nulls, or numbers. For example, a tag "yes" would become
boolean true without quoting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
